ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* The make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* The model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "price" REAL /* The price at which the vehicle is listed */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle (if used) */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespersons ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the vehicle in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the vehicle is stored */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of vehicle specifications */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine the vehicle has */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the vehicle */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Engine capacity of the vehicle (in liters) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_specs_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES vehicles ("model")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer review */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES vehicles ("model")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the loyalty program record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer participating in the program */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the customer */,
  "level" TEXT /* Membership level of the customer in the loyalty program */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Status of the loyalty program */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespersons" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "salesperson_name" TEXT /* Name of the salesperson */,
  "salesperson_email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "salesperson_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_city" TEXT /* City of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_state" TEXT /* State of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_country" TEXT /* Country of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)
